metadata.rationale: The piece mixes real Oscars-night coverage with misleading reframing of separate materials: an edited Vanity Fair party photo is presented as an official Oscars red-carpet arrival, and later online speculation about future films is recast as conversation happening at the venue during Oscar night. These distortions do not erase the real event backdrop, but they materially alter how readers understand what happened on site.
